lang.name: English
library.title: Library
buckets.title: 🪣 Delivery buckets
buckets.empty.line1: No buckets yet. Enter a name + press Enter below to create the first.
buckets.empty.line2: Once created, drag cards onto a bucket to assign.
buckets.empty.line3: Each bucket can be exported as a ZIP, copied as filenames, or cleared.
buckets.reorder.title: Drag to reorder
lightbox.close.title: Close (Esc)
lightbox.rotate_cw.title: Rotate 90° clockwise
lightbox.rotate_ccw.title: Rotate 90° counter-clockwise
lightbox.zoom_one_to_one.title: 1:1 focus check (z) — click anywhere on the image to zoom to that point
lightbox.section.scores: ★ Scores · human → DeepSeek → VLM → model → auto
lightbox.similar.empty: No obviously-similar photos in this batch
lightbox.similar.hint: Click to jump · Shift-click to add to A/B compare
lightbox.toolbar.keep.title: Keep (1)
lightbox.toolbar.maybe.title: Maybe (2)
lightbox.toolbar.cull.title: Cull (3) · optionally pick a cull reason
shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.hint.title: ? Show full keyboard shortcuts (also press ?)
export.menu.title: Export / download / auto caption
export.xmp_zip.title: Export XMP ratings as a ZIP (Lightroom / Capture One)
export.xmp_alongside.title: Write XMP sidecar files next to the originals
export.csv.title: Download the full scores.csv (Excel/Numbers friendly)
export.json.title: Structured JSON export — every field + annotations + tags
export.lrcat.title: Export an Lr catalog import template, drag straight into Lightroom
export.gallery.title: Export a standalone HTML gallery to share with the client
export.share_link.title: Generate a read-only link for clients showing only the keeps
export.style_train.title: Use the current keeps as references — learn your personal-style profile
export.sync_event.title: Generate a collaboration link so a second-shooter / editor can join the same run
save_view.title: Save the current filter + sort + cull-reason combo as a named preset
filter.no_match: No photos match the current filters
annotation.title: Rubric annotation
annotation.next.title: Label by active-learning priority
annotation.batch.title: Bulk-label keep/cull by score threshold
share.brand.subtitle: PixCull · client delivery preview
share.empty: The photographer hasn't picked the selects yet — check back soon.
tether.title: Tethered Live
tether.sub: Watch a tether folder — new photos are analyzed on landing, grid refreshes live.
tether.folder.label: Folder path
tether.note: Any local folder works. The session snapshots existing files on start; only new files are analyzed.
history.title: History timeline
history.sub: All past runs · sorted by date · click a card to jump back to its grid
toast.copy_failed: Clipboard write failed — browser may have blocked it
tour.title: ✨ Feature tour — power features
tour.btn.title: Feature tour — PixCull's power features at a glance
tour.foot: Full shortcut list under ? · everything runs 100% locally
toast.session_done: 🎉 All reviewed — click "Export XMP" in the workbar to take your decisions back to Lightroom
toast.resolve_mode_enter: ◐ Resolve mode: {n} maybes, most uncertain first — press 1/2/3 to decide
toast.resolve_mode_blocked: Your current scene/face filters hide every maybe — clear them, or click again to exit resolve mode
onboard.title: Getting started
onboard.tip1: mark keep / maybe / cull and auto-advance (~1-2s each; ⏩ toggles off)
onboard.tip2: see every shortcut (auto-highlighted for the current view)
onboard.tip3: top-right 🪣 bucket: drag cards in to build a delivery set
toast.disagree_mode_enter: ⚖ Disagreement review: {n} photos where the model and the rules disagree, most-confident splits first — press 1/2/3 to decide; your calls feed the correction set
toast.disagree_mode_blocked: Your current filters hide every disagreement — clear them, or click again to exit review
toast.disagree_cleared: Disagreement review done ✓ — your calls are in the correction set
toast.compare_added: Added to compare: {n} · Enter to open, Esc to clear
toast.compare_need_two: Pick at least two to compare
compare.modal.title: A/B compare ({n})
compare.modal.meta: Sorted by score_final; left is the system pick. "Pick this" culls the rest.
